reason: Primary quality gate: masking, authorization, error/empty/unknown states, and test expectations.
Verify frontend contract mirrors, zod parsing, no backend imports, and no domain any usage.
Verify all MSW responses parse through schemas and handler tests cover success/error paths.
Verify URL state, TanStack Query server state, ActorContext global state, and sensitive temporary state are not mixed.
Verify explicit domain branches, accessible text, masking badges, and no color-only state communication.
Tracker-level acceptance criteria across all four child surfaces.
Vulnerability child acceptance criteria and route/URL-state expectations.
Mail child acceptance criteria, raw-body non-display, and unavailable/body-only checks.
Log child acceptance criteria, redactedFields rendering, mandatory assetGroupId, and text-first trend checks.
Weak-password child acceptance criteria, sensitive temporary state, export password, and permission-window checks.
Quality scripts: typecheck, test, build, lint.
MSW test server reset and test harness behavior.
Verify all new routes and viewer/raw-evidence route guards.
Verify all new handlers are registered.
Verify mirrored contracts exist for vulnerability, mail-analysis, log-ingestion, and weak-password/report-export surfaces.
